image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about selection bias.
Context visual: Selection bias occurs when the sample in a study isn't representative of the whole population.
Escalation visual: This can lead to misleading conclusions, especially in health research.
Evidence visual: For example, if a study only gathers data from one demographic, it overlooks critical insight.
Payoff visual: Recognizing this bias helps us interpret research more accurately.
Cta visual: Want to learn more about biases in research? Hit that follow button!
